hero.description: Track vaccinations, book vet visits, manage insurance, and transfer animal records — all from one digital platform built for Nepali farms.

features.description: A complete platform designed for farmers and veterinarians to monitor, manage, and improve the health and productivity of livestock.

profiles.title: Digital Animal Profiles
profiles.desc: Maintain complete records: breed, age, medical history & more in one place.

appointments.title: Appointment Booking
appointments.desc: Find and schedule veterinary professionals instantly from your phone.

vaccination.title: Smart Vaccination Reminders
vaccination.desc: Automatic alerts via SMS and app for upcoming vaccinations and boosters.

insurance.title: Insurance & Ownership Transfer
insurance.desc: Secure livestock insurance and quick digital ownership transfer at a tap.

verifiedVets.title: Verified Veterinarians
verifiedVets.desc: Connect with government-verified vets nearby for trusted advice and care.

notifications.title: Real-time Notifications
notifications.desc: Stay updated on appointments, claims, transfers, and treatment progress.

community.title: Community Network
community.desc: Build a friend network of farmers and vets to share knowledge and support.

insights.title: Insights & Reports
insights.desc: Visual dashboards turn your livestock data into clear, actionable insights.

mission.description: LHMMS empowers Nepali farmers by reducing livestock mortality through accessible and affordable digital health tracking — from the smallest village to the busiest dairy farm.
mission.point1: Works even in low-connectivity areas (SMS support)
mission.point2: No hardware required, only phone or laptop
mission.point3: Designed specifically for rural farmers & veterinarians
mission.point4: Affordable and accessible for all of Nepal
mission.quote: By providing farmers with digital tools, we're helping preserve Nepal's agricultural heritage while embracing modern technology.

contact.description: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...

footer.description: Livestock Health Management & Monitoring System — empowering Nepali farmers and veterinarians with simple digital tools.
